html:
Exclusive to:

The Keystone is an item retrieved from the Reliquary in the Key Room. Its sole purpose is to be offered to the Beckoning Hand at the Ancient Gateway, triggering a confirmation prompt. If confirmed, the Sanctum is reset.

The Beckoning Hand only appears after the Ancient Fuelweaver has been defeated. The first Beckoning Hand requests 5 Dreadstones to repair the Ancient Gateway, after which a second Beckoning Hand appears to accept the Keystone.

The Keystone cannot be transferred between the Caves and the Surface. Attempting to do so causes it to be left behind at the Stairs.

Pop-up message after giving Keystone to Beckoning Hand.

Trivia

  • The Ancient Guard Tower Pieces were introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

Gallery

  • Keystone Map Icon

Exclusive to:
“Did I finally find the key to going home?”
–Wilson
“Anywhere's gotta be better than this place. Right...?”
–Willow
“Will weird rock help bring Wolfgang home?”
–Wolfgang
“They went to such lengths to hide it... I wonder why?”
–Wendy
“PASSKEY ACQUIRED”
–WX-78
“I'm wary of just what it might unlock...”
–Wickerbottom
“Hard to believe this could actually get us home...”
–Woodie
“The Keystone...”
–Maxwell
“'Tis the key tö öur salvatiön!”
–Wigfrid
“Do you think it can help us get home?”
–Webber
“What secrets might it unlock?”
–Warly
“Scary...”
–Wormwood
“Maybe I'll finally get some answers.”
–Winona
“The key to our salvation, or destruction? Hyuyuyu, I can't wait to find out!”
–Wortox
“Oooooh! What it unlock, florp?”
–Wurt
“I can't wait to see what this unlocks!”
–Walter
“So. It's all come down to this.”
–Wanda
The Keystone is an item retrieved from the Reliquary in the Key Room. Its sole purpose is to be offered to the Beckoning Hand at the Ancient Gateway, triggering a confirmation prompt. If confirmed, the Sanctum is reset.
The Beckoning Hand only appears after the Ancient Fuelweaver has been defeated. The first Beckoning Hand requests 5 Dreadstones to repair the Ancient Gateway, after which a second Beckoning Hand appears to accept the Keystone.
The Keystone cannot be transferred between the Caves and the Surface. Attempting to do so causes it to be left behind at the Stairs.
Pop-up message after giving Keystone to Beckoning Hand.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Keystone là một vật phẩm được lấy từ Reliquary trong Key Room. Mục đích duy nhất của nó là được trao cho Bàn tay vẫy tay ở Cổng cổ, kích hoạt lời nhắc xác nhận. Nếu được xác nhận, Sanctum sẽ được đặt lại.

The '''Keystone''' is an item retrieved from the [[Reliquary]] in the [[Key Room]]. Its sole purpose is to be offered to the [[Beckoning Hand]] at the [[Ancient Gateway]], triggering a confirmation prompt. If confirmed, the [[Sanctum]] is reset.

The Beckoning Hand only appears after the [[Ancient Fuelweaver]] has been defeated. The first Beckoning Hand requests 5 [[Dreadstone]]s to repair the Ancient Gateway, after which a second Beckoning Hand appears to accept the Keystone.

The Keystone cannot be transferred between the Caves and the Surface. Attempting to do so causes it to be left behind at the Stairs.

[[File:Keystone Announcement.png|500px|thumb|left|Pop-up message after giving Keystone to Beckoning Hand.]]
